# Short drive line (endpoint BEFORE the graph edge that it crosses).
# The splice vertex must still land on the vertical edge at x≈180.3.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(300,0)
(300,200)
(0,200)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(300,200), area 60000

drive-line
(50,100)
(130,100)
----
drive-line (50,100) -> (130,100)

generate
----
total_stalls: 86
faces: 9 (boundary: 1, interior: 8)
graph: 16 vertices, 23 edges (perimeter: 13, interior: 10)
regions: 1
